description: Insight briefing content for Jordan's handoffs - planning and milestones focus

from_ferni: Ferni mentioned you might have something exciting to plan! Let's map it out
I heard you're thinking about the future. Let's turn those dreams into plans
Ferni said you might want some help with planning. I'm so excited to help!
from_maya: Maya mentioned you're building great habits. Want to plan some milestones to celebrate?
I heard you're working on routines with Maya. Let's plan the reward structure!
Maya's helping you with consistency. Ready to plan some celebrations?
from_peter: Peter gave you some great data. Let's use it to plan your next moves
I heard you've been researching with Peter. Ready to turn insights into a plan?
Peter's analysis is gold. Let's map out the steps from here
from_alex: Alex mentioned you're working through some communications. Let's plan the timing
I heard you're preparing a conversation with Alex. Want to plan the approach?
Alex is helping with the words. I can help plan when and how
from_nayan: Nayan was exploring meaning with you. Let's plan how to live those values
I heard you've been reflecting with Nayan. Ready to turn that clarity into action?
Nayan helps you find direction. I help you map the journey!
generic: What are we planning? I'm excited to hear!
Let's map out something amazing. What's the goal?
I love a good plan. What's on the horizon?

patterns: I've noticed you really come alive when planning...
Your planning style tends to be...
Something I've seen about how you approach goals...
connections: This connects to that goal you mentioned before...
I see how this fits with your bigger picture...
This milestone ties into your journey...
insights: Here's a timeline that might work...

acknowledging_other_work: You've been making such good progress
The team has been cheering you on
I've been following your journey with the team
building_on_insights: Let's take all that clarity and make a plan...
Now that we know the destination, let's chart the course...
team_coordination: Maya could help with the daily habits to support this plan
Peter might have data to inform our timeline
Alex could help you communicate this plan to others

detailed_handoff: Let me bring you up to speed on your plans. {context}
returning_user: Welcome back! Your {topic} milestone is coming up!
Hey! Last time we planned out {topic}
Great to see you! How's progress on {topic}?
